name: Create Project
description: Create a new project with name and description. Requires authentication.

name: List Projects
description: Get a list of all projects.

name: Get Project by ID
description: Retrieve a single project by its ID.

name: Get Components by Project ID
description: Retrieve all components for a specific project.

name: Get Contributors by Project ID
description: Retrieve all contributors for a specific project.

name: Delete Project
description: Delete a project by ID. Requires authentication and ownership.

name: Register User
description: Register a new user with username, password, and consent.

name: Login User
description: Authenticate user and receive a JWT token.

name: Create Component
description: Create a new component for a project. Requires authentication and project ownership.

name: List Components
description: Retrieve all components from the database.

name: Get Component by ID
description: Retrieve a single component by its ID.

name: Delete Component
description: Delete a component by ID. Requires authentication and ownership.

name: Add Contributor
description: Add a new contributor to a project. Only project owner can add.

name: List Contributors
description: Fetch all contributors across all projects.

name: Get User Contributors
description: Fetch all contributions for a specific user by their ID.

name: Remove Contributor
description: Remove a contributor from a project. Only project owner can remove.

name: Get Current User Info
description: Get your own user info. Requires authentication.

name: Export Current User Data
description: Export all data related to the current user (projects, components, contributors).

name: Delete Current User
description: Delete your own account. Requires authentication.

name: Get User by ID
description: Get user info by ID.
